Video.summary: Hunter helps a distressed war buddy look for the kidnappers of his mail-order bride - CHARLES HALLAHAN stars.
Video.title: The Jade Woman

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall go undercover at an exclusive resort to find a blackmailer's killer.
Video.title: The Biggest Man In Town

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a security guard turned thief as he searches for the money he stole and lost.
Video.title: Million Dollar Misunderstanding

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: A millionaire is nearly killed, his wife the prime suspect, until she's murdered.
Video.title: Rich Girl

Video.summary: Tony attempts to protect an informant from a mysterious hit man.
Video.title: Shoot The Breeze

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall spend a frightening night in a remote mansion with a family of murder suspects.
Video.title: Night On Bald Mountain

Video.summary: Erik Estrada guest stars as a tough-minded detective who joins Hunter and McCall to catch a serial rapist.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 1

Video.summary: NYPD detective Connie Muldoon presses to find a serial killer.
Video.title: Off Broadway, Part 2

Video.summary: After he shoots a woman in a drunken domestic squabble, Officer Kelly becomes the victim of a campaign.
Video.title: Officer April

Video.summary: Tony faces the biggest challenge of his career when an murder case from his past resurfaces.
Video.title: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1

Image.alt: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1

Video.summary: The unwelcome appearance in Eastbridge of white supremacists leads to a murder, with the suspicion soon arising that one of more Tony's associates may be implicated.
Video.title: True Believers

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness.
Video.title: The Big Fall

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall witness a string of murders when they're assigned as technical advisers for a tv show.
Video.title: Killer In The Halloween Mask

Video.summary: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 2

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie investigate a puzzling arson case.
Video.title: Sex, Lies, and Kerosene

Video.summary: A serial rapist known as Big Foot stalks McCall while Hunter investigates the death of a teenage prostitute.
Video.title: City Of Passion, Part 2

Video.summary: Racial tensions mount after the accidental shooting of the son of a Hispanic councilman by police.
Video.title: Flashpoint

Video.summary: After the murder of a crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: arrest the killer or let him go.
Video.title: Playing God

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover to trap a killer who runs a string of illegal gambling casinos.
Video.title: Internal Affairs

Video.summary: Chris becomes involved with a college prostitute as he and Rita attempt to solve the death of another.
Video.title: Working Girl

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover as film execs when a local movie crew becomes the target of militants.
Video.title: Baser Instincts
